title: Clover
body:
A bunch of random things I decided to add to the game, JEI is recommended. Adds many items including:

Walnuts + Wood to go with them,
 Chipmunk Dimension Portal Igniter,
 Wulfenite + Armor and blocks to go with it,
 Fire scrolls,
 Wulfenite Barrels and Carved Wulfenite,
 3 new structures,
 2 new advancements,
 1 Painting,
 1 Dimension,
 and much more...



Made in MCreator
